requirement_topic.en: Authorized Philippine Importer — NTC and DTI Registration
requirement_topic.zh: 授权菲律宾进口商——NTC与DTI注册
requirement_topic.zht: 授權菲律賓進口商——NTC與DTI登記

summary.en: All wireless and telecommunications devices imported into the Philippines for commercial sale must be imported by an authorized Philippine importer that is registered with both the National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) and the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI). The importer of record must be a Philippine-registered legal entity (sole proprietorship, partnership, or corporation registered with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) or the Department of Trade and Industry for sole proprietorships). The importer applies for NTC type approval (TA) in its own name, obtains the NTC Permit to Import (PTI) for each commercial shipment, and is responsible for ensuring the NTC sticker is affixed to products and outer packaging before sale. The importer must also be registered with DTI for applicable product certification and labelling requirements under Republic Act 7394. Foreign manufacturers or exporters cannot hold Philippine NTC type approval certificates directly — a Philippine in-country entity must be the applicant and certificate holder. Distributors or retail sellers are not exempt from ensuring the importer has valid NTC and DTI registrations before product is placed on sale. The SEC-registered Philippine importer also becomes the legal responsible party for Data Privacy Act (RA 10173) compliance obligations if the device processes personal data.
summary.zh: 所有以商业销售为目的进口至菲律宾的无线和电信设备，须由已在国家电信委员会（NTC）和贸工部（DTI）注册的授权菲律宾进口商进行进口。进口记录人须为依菲律宾法律注册的法律实体（独资企业、合伙企业，或已向证券交易委员会（SEC）注册的公司；独资企业也可向贸工部注册）。进口商以自身名义申请NTC型号认证（TA），为每批商业货运取得NTC进口许可（PTI），并负责确保在销售前将NTC标贴贴附于产品和外包装上。进口商还须依据《共和国法案7394》向DTI注册，满足适用的产品认证和标注要求。境外制造商或出口商不能直接持有菲律宾NTC型号认证证书——菲律宾境内实体必须作为申请人和证书持有人。分销商或零售商在将产品上市前，不得免除确认进口商持有有效NTC和DTI注册的责任。若设备处理个人数据，SEC注册菲律宾进口商还将成为《数据隐私法》（RA 10173）合规义务的法律责任方。
summary.zht: 所有以商業銷售為目的進口至菲律賓的無線和電信設備，須由已在國家電信委員會（NTC）和貿工部（DTI）登記的授權菲律賓進口商進行進口。進口記錄人須為依菲律賓法律登記的法律實體（獨資企業、合夥企業，或已向證券交易委員會（SEC）登記的公司；獨資企業也可向貿工部登記）。進口商以自身名義申請NTC型號認證（TA），為每批商業貨運取得NTC進口許可（PTI），並負責確保在銷售前將NTC標貼貼附於產品和外包裝上。進口商還須依據《共和國法案7394》向DTI登記，滿足適用的產品認證和標注要求。境外製造商或出口商不能直接持有菲律賓NTC型號認證證書——菲律賓境內實體必須作為申請人和證書持有人。分銷商或零售商在將產品上市前，不得免除確認進口商持有有效NTC和DTI登記的責任。若設備處理個人資料，SEC登記菲律賓進口商還將成為《資料隱私法》（RA 10173）合規義務的法律責任方。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 7925 — Public Telecommunications Policy Act of the Philippines (NTC jurisdiction over importation of telecom devices; importer registration requirement)
NTC Permit to Import (PTI) — required per commercial shipment; application by the NTC-registered Philippine importer
Republic Act No. 7394 — Consumer Act of the Philippines (DTI importer and distributor obligations; product standards and labelling)
Philippine SEC registration — required for corporations and partnerships importing regulated telecommunications and electronics products
Bureau of Customs (BOC) import documentation requirements — valid NTC PTI and NTC TA certificate required for customs clearance of telecom and radio devices

summary.en: China does not impose an in-country importer requirement equivalent to Philippine NTC / DTI importer registration as a condition for device certification. The Chinese SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL are typically held by the Chinese manufacturer directly. CCC under CNCA is held by the manufacturer or a Chinese-registered enterprise. There is no direct equivalent to the Philippine requirement that a Philippines-registered in-country entity must hold and apply for the NTC type approval certificate. Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Philippines must identify, contract, and support a Philippine-registered importer as the NTC certificate applicant and PTI holder.
summary.zh: 中国没有设备认证条件下等同于菲律宾NTC / DTI进口商注册要求的境内进口商要求。SRRC型号核准和MIIT进网许可通常直接由中国制造商持有。CNCA主管的CCC由制造商或中国注册企业持有。中国没有与菲律宾要求等效的机制——即要求菲律宾注册境内实体必须持有并申请NTC型号认证证书。向菲律宾出口的中国制造商须确定、签约并支持一家菲律宾注册进口商作为NTC证书申请人和PTI持有人。
summary.zht: 中國沒有設備認證條件下等同於菲律賓NTC / DTI進口商登記要求的境內進口商要求。SRRC型號核准和MIIT進網許可通常直接由中國製造商持有。CNCA主管的CCC由製造商或中國登記企業持有。中國沒有與菲律賓要求等效的機制——即要求菲律賓登記境內實體必須持有並申請NTC型號認證證書。向菲律賓出口的中國製造商須確定、簽約並支持一家菲律賓登記進口商作為NTC證書申請人和PTI持有人。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio type approval — held by Chinese manufacturer (MIIT / State Radio Regulation of China)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可证) — held by Chinese manufacturer or Chinese-registered enterprise
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — held by manufacturer or Chinese-registered enterprise under CNCA
No equivalent China requirement for manufacturer to appoint an in-country importer as certificate holder

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers cannot hold Philippine NTC type approval certificates in their own name. A Philippine-registered entity must be appointed as the authorized importer, NTC TA certificate applicant, and PTI holder before any commercial shipment can be made. This requires: (1) identifying or establishing a Philippine SEC-registered entity; (2) the Philippine entity registering with NTC and DTI; (3) the Philippine importer applying for NTC type approval in its own name with manufacturer technical support; and (4) the Philippine importer obtaining a PTI for each commercial shipment batch. The importer bears ongoing legal responsibility for the product in the Philippine market under RA 7925, RA 7394, and RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act) obligations. Common Chinese exporter errors: shipping without a PTI in the importer's name, or treating a logistics agent as the legal importer of record without proper NTC and DTI registration.
gap.zh: 中国制造商不能以自身名义持有菲律宾NTC型号认证证书。在进行任何商业货运前，须指定一家菲律宾注册实体作为授权进口商、NTC型号认证证书申请人和PTI持有人。这要求：（1）确定或设立一家菲律宾SEC注册实体；（2）该菲律宾实体向NTC和DTI注册；（3）菲律宾进口商在制造商技术支持下以自身名义申请NTC型号认证；（4）菲律宾进口商为每批商业货运取得PTI。进口商依据RA 7925、RA 7394和RA 10173（《数据隐私法》）义务，对菲律宾市场中的产品承担持续法律责任。常见中国出口商错误：未以进口商名义持有PTI发货，或将物流代理视为法律意义上的进口记录人却未完成NTC和DTI注册。
gap.zht: 中國製造商不能以自身名義持有菲律賓NTC型號認證證書。在進行任何商業貨運前，須指定一家菲律賓登記實體作為授權進口商、NTC型號認證證書申請人和PTI持有人。這要求：（1）確定或設立一家菲律賓SEC登記實體；（2）該菲律賓實體向NTC和DTI登記；（3）菲律賓進口商在製造商技術支持下以自身名義申請NTC型號認證；（4）菲律賓進口商為每批商業貨運取得PTI。進口商依據RA 7925、RA 7394和RA 10173（《資料隱私法》）義務，對菲律賓市場中的產品承擔持續法律責任。常見中國出口商錯誤：未以進口商名義持有PTI發貨，或將物流代理視為法律意義上的進口記錄人卻未完成NTC和DTI登記。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Philippine-registered in-country importer required as NTC type approval certificate holder and PTI applicant; importer must register with NTC and DTI; no direct importation by foreign manufacturers into Philippine commercial market without a Philippine importer of record
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, and CCC certifications are held by the Chinese manufacturer or Chinese-registered enterprise directly; no in-country importer registration requirement equivalent to Philippine NTC / DTI regime

source.publisher: National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) — Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An authorized Philippine-registered importer that holds NTC registration and DTI registration is mandatory for commercial importation of wireless and telecommunications devices into the Philippines. Chinese manufacturers cannot hold NTC type approval certificates directly. The Philippine importer must apply for NTC type approval in its own name, obtain an NTC Permit to Import (PTI) for each commercial shipment, and ensure NTC stickers are affixed to products before sale. The importer bears ongoing legal responsibility under RA 7925, RA 7394, and RA 10173. Chinese manufacturers should identify their authorized Philippine importer and establish technical collaboration for the NTC type approval application before initiating any commercial shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于无线和电信设备的商业进口，须持有NTC注册和DTI注册的授权菲律宾注册进口商为强制要求。中国制造商不能直接持有NTC型号认证证书。菲律宾进口商须以自身名义申请NTC型号认证，为每批商业货运取得NTC进口许可（PTI），并确保在销售前将NTC标贴贴附于产品上。进口商依据RA 7925、RA 7394和RA 10173承担持续法律责任。中国制造商应在启动任何商业货运前确定其授权菲律宾进口商，并就NTC型号认证申请建立技术合作。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於無線和電信設備的商業進口，須持有NTC登記和DTI登記的授權菲律賓登記進口商為強制要求。中國製造商不能直接持有NTC型號認證證書。菲律賓進口商須以自身名義申請NTC型號認證，為每批商業貨運取得NTC進口許可（PTI），並確保在銷售前將NTC標貼貼附於產品上。進口商依據RA 7925、RA 7394和RA 10173承擔持續法律責任。中國製造商應在啟動任何商業貨運前確定其授權菲律賓進口商，並就NTC型號認證申請建立技術合作。
